station_address: near Vasant Complex, Sector 6, RDP 8, Charkop Industrial Area, Kandivali West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400067
text:
Worst experience at this petrol pump. Some staff members are not polite at all and they talk in a very arrogant manner. Even senior staff people are working here but they don’t know how to speak properly with customers.

Instead of accepting their mistake, they try to blame the customer. Customer service is extremely poor.

Please train your staff on how to behave and communicate with customers. Otherwise customers will stop trusting this petrol pump.

station_address: near Vasant Complex, Sector 6, RDP 8, Charkop Industrial Area, Kandivali West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400067
text: One of the best places in the city. The fuel quality is something I've come to depend on over the years. If you're in the suburbs, I highly recommend you top up your tank here.

station_address: near Vasant Complex, Sector 6, RDP 8, Charkop Industrial Area, Kandivali West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400067
text: Good staff.  I mainly use it for CNG refilling and staff is so efficient that usually i spend max 15 minfor CNG filling.  Moreover they have facility to fill CNG in 3 cars at a time. Obviously they have separate queue for autos. Credit cards are accepted here even for a small amount.  Does not have eWallet like Paytm facility.

station_address: near Vasant Complex, Sector 6, RDP 8, Charkop Industrial Area, Kandivali West, Mumbai, Maharashtra 400067
text: Good customer service. Staff was helpful in guiding car to least crowded point for faster refueling. Was amazed that minor scratches on my car were removed free of charge as part of customer service. Windshield cleaner does good job as well.
